name: quorum-analyst-skills
description: Fifteen named-methodology analyst skills (Porter's Five Forces, Value Chain, Jobs-to-be-Done & Disruption, 7 Powers, Good Strategy/Bad Strategy, Playing to Win, Blue Ocean, Crossing the Chasm, PESTEL, TAM/SAM/SOM, Ansoff, Three Horizons, Minto Pyramid, DCF/comparables valuation, and MECE engagement scoping) for consulting-grade market and strategy analysis. Each skill is a standalone SKILL.md with an on-demand reference; together they staff the Quorum engagement engine.
